DELETE FROM users WHERE users.country_code <> 'admin'
DELETE FROM comments WHERE comments.created_at < DATETIME('now', '-1 days')
DELETE FROM comments WHERE comments.comment_text = 'activity'
DELETE FROM comments WHERE comments.comment_text <> 'user'
DELETE FROM follows WHERE follows.followed_at >= DATETIME('now', '-23 days')
DELETE FROM users WHERE users.id > 95
DELETE FROM posts WHERE posts.view_count <> 913
DELETE FROM follows WHERE follows.follower_id <> 289
DELETE FROM follows WHERE follows.followed_at < DATETIME('now', '-1 days')
